objective: Re-run the supported LM Studio download probe and immediate preflight validation without making runtime changes, then decide whether the blocker remains.

details: Captured a bounded `lms get https://huggingface.co/lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit --mlx -y` probe with 120s timeout.
The probe resolved artifact metadata but stalled at 0.00% and timed out.
Re-ran the LM Studio VLM preflight with a fresh output file.
Preflight remains `ready_for_live_validation=false` because `lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit` is still not visible in `lms ls --json`.

commands.finding: Probe resolved the artifact name but stayed stalled with `max_percent=0.0` and returned timeout after 120s.

decision.blocker: Supported `lms get --mlx -y` still hangs at 0% with timeout; `lms ls --json` still hides the retained VLM model key.
decision.next_action: Do not switch to other registration paths. Continue with upstream or local hypothesis work only while waiting for LM Studio model-index resolution changes outside this repo.
